name: 18_Image_Enhancement_SRGAN_DIV2K_DL
query: Nahitaji kuunda mfumo wa kuboresha picha kwa kutumia mfano wa SRGAN (unaweza kupata SRGAN iliyofunzwa awali [hapa](https://github.com/tensorlayer/srgan)) na seti ya data ya DIV2K, ambayo inaweza kupakuliwa kutoka [kiungo hiki](https://data.vision.ee.ethz.ch/cvl/DIV2K/). Seti ya data inapaswa kupakiwa katika faili `src/data_loader.py`. Mfumo unapaswa kusindika picha, ikiwa ni pamoja na kubadilisha ukubwa na kuweka kawaida, katika `src/data_loader.py`. Tumia mfano uliyojifunza awali uliowekwa chini ya `models/saved_models/` kuokoa muda, na hifadhi picha zilizoboreshwa kwenye saraka ya `results/figures/`. Aidha, mfumo unapaswa kuonyesha na kuhifadhi kulinganisha kati ya picha za asili na zilizoboreshwa kwenye `results/figures/enhanced_comparison.png`. Hatimaye, unda ripoti ya Markdown yenye matokeo na vielelezo kwenye seti tofauti za sampuli ili kuonyesha utendaji wa mfano kwenye aina mbalimbali za picha, na ihifadhi kama `results/report.md`. Ripoti inapaswa kujumuisha kulinganisha kwa kina kwa utendaji wa mfano kwenye sampuli hizi zilizochaguliwa, ikionyesha pale ambapo mfano unafanya vizuri au unapata changamoto.

requirements.criteria: Seti ya data ya "DIV2K" imepakiwa katika faili `src/data_loader.py`.
Mfano wa "SRGAN" uliyojifunza awali umehifadhiwa chini ya `models/saved_models/`.
Usindikaji wa picha, ikiwa ni pamoja na kubadilisha ukubwa na kuweka kawaida, umetekelezwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Picha zilizoboreshwa zimehifadhiwa kwenye folda maalum `results/figures/`.
Kulinganisha kwa picha za asili na zilizoboreshwa kunaonyeshwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/figures/enhanced_comparison.png`.
Faili ya Markdown yenye matokeo na vielelezo inazalishwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/report.md`.

preferences.criteria: Seti tofauti za sampuli zinapaswa kuchaguliwa ili kuonyesha utendaji wa mfano kwenye aina mbalimbali za picha.
Ripoti ya Markdown inapaswa kujumuisha kulinganisha kwa kina kwa utendaji wa mfano kwenye sampuli hizi zilizochaguliwa, ikionyesha pale ambapo mfano unafanya vizuri au unapata changamoto.

judge_stats.criteria: Seti ya data ya "DIV2K" imepakiwa katika faili `src/data_loader.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/data_loader.py` file does not implement actual DIV2K dataset loading. It only contains a placeholder function `load_dataset()` that returns a hardcoded dictionary `{"dataset": "loaded", "notes": requirement_notes()}`, and a `build_transforms()` function returning a static list. There is no real code for downloading, reading, or processing the DIV2K dataset (e.g., no use of `torchvision.datasets`, no file path handling for DIV2K images, no actual data pipeline). The file merely lists DIV2K as a keyword in `REQUIREMENT_CRITERIA` without implementing the functionality.

judge_stats.criteria: Mfano wa "SRGAN" uliyojifunza awali umehifadhiwa chini ya `models/saved_models/`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The project structure shows that the `models/saved_models/` directory exists but is empty — no SRGAN model files (e.g., `.pth`, `.pt`, `.h5`, or similar) are stored within it. Additionally, the `src/data_loader.py` file is merely a placeholder with no actual SRGAN training or model-saving logic implemented. The trajectory evidence also confirms that no steps related to saving or loading an SRGAN model under `models/saved_models/` were found.

judge_stats.criteria: Usindikaji wa picha, ikiwa ni pamoja na kubadilisha ukubwa na kuweka kawaida, umetekelezwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/data_loader.py` file does not contain any actual implementation of image preprocessing (resizing or normalization). The `build_transforms()` function merely returns a static list of strings `["rotation", "scaling", "normalization"]` — this is a placeholder with no real code using libraries like `torchvision.transforms`, `PIL`, `cv2`, or `numpy` to perform actual resizing or normalization operations. Similarly, `load_dataset()` returns a hardcoded dictionary `{"dataset": "loaded", ...}` with no real data loading logic. The file is explicitly described as a "Minimal semantic implementation" placeholder, confirming that no functional image preprocessing has been implemented.

judge_stats.criteria: Picha zilizoboreshwa zimehifadhiwa kwenye folda maalum `results/figures/`.

reason:
<SATISFIED>

The project structure clearly shows that the `results/figures/` directory exists and contains the file `enhanced_comparison.png`. This directly satisfies the requirement that enhanced images are saved in the designated `results/figures/` folder. The file name `enhanced_comparison.png` is consistent with the task of image enhancement (SRGAN/DIV2K), suggesting it contains comparison results of enhanced images.

judge_stats.criteria: Kulinganisha kwa picha za asili na zilizoboreshwa kunaonyeshwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/figures/enhanced_comparison.png`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The file `results/figures/enhanced_comparison.png` exists in the project structure, but its content shows an error message rather than an actual image. The error indicates: `"The image was specified using the image/jpeg media type, but the image appears to be a image/png image"` — meaning the file was not successfully generated as a valid comparison image. There is no evidence that a proper visual comparison between original and enhanced images was created and saved. The file is essentially corrupted or invalid.

judge_stats.criteria: Faili ya Markdown yenye matokeo na vielelezo inazalishwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/report.md`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The file `results/report.md` exists in the workspace, but its content is merely `('placeholder', None)` — this is not a valid Markdown report with results and figures. A proper report should contain meaningful content such as model performance metrics, analysis, and references to generated figures (like `enhanced_comparison.png`). The file appears to be an unfilled placeholder rather than a genuine generated report.
